theme: The Clubhouse — HTML Reports + Launch Polish

shots.title: Static HTML report generation
shots.notes: New report.ts in core with buildReportData() + generateHtmlReport(). Embedded SVG charts: handicap trend, dispersion scatter, area performance bars, nutrition stacked bars, sprint history table. CLI slope report --html with --output and --metaphor flags. Self-contained HTML with inline CSS. 15 core tests + 5 CLI tests.

shots.title: Report metaphor awareness
shots.notes: All report sections now use configured metaphor terms: title, summary cards, chart headings, table headers, dispersion labels, club names, nutrition categories, legend text. 9 new metaphor tests verify gaming vs golf label differences.

shots.title: Documentation + README overhaul
shots.notes: Complete README rewrite: metaphor comparison table, 3-platform setup guide (Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode), agent guidance hooks section, CLI commands organized by category (scoring, planning, sessions, hooks, setup), core API examples with reports + metaphors.

shots.title: Launch checklist + version bump
shots.notes: All 704 tests pass, build + typecheck clean, version bumped 1.0.0 → 1.1.0 across all 4 packages. CLAUDE.md test counts updated.

conditions.description: Context continued from previous session — S12 just completed, flow state maintained

nutrition.description: Full build+test+typecheck after every ticket (704 tests at completion)
Commit-per-ticket discipline — 4 commits for 4 tickets, pushed after each
29 new tests: 24 core (report + metaphor awareness) + 5 CLI (report integration)
Zero hazards — 4th consecutive clean sprint. One test helper bug (missing ...overrides spread) caught and fixed immediately.

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Fourth consecutive par sprint and cleanest execution yet. The HTML report generation came together quickly with embedded SVG — no external dependencies needed. The metaphor awareness was a clean wedge shot since the report already accepted MetaphorDefinition params.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: The report module at packages/core/src/report.ts is fully self-contained — HTML + CSS + SVG charts with no dependencies. When adding new chart types, follow the pattern: data computation in buildReportData(), SVG renderer function, then wire into generateHtmlReport(). Metaphor terms are passed through to all renderers.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: The makeScorecard test helper bug (forgetting ...overrides spread) was the only hiccup across all 4 tickets. The embedded SVG approach for charts is surprisingly clean — viewBox scaling handles responsiveness naturally.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: Phase 2 is complete. S14 brings multi-agent orchestration — roles, communication protocol, and swarm sessions. The foundation (scoring + metaphors + guidance + reports) is solid.

yardage_book_updates: packages/core/src/report.ts: buildReportData(), generateHtmlReport(), SVG chart renderers
Report charts: handicap trend (line), dispersion (scatter), area performance (horizontal bars), nutrition (stacked bars)
All report sections use MetaphorDefinition for display terms
README.md: complete rewrite with metaphor table, 3-platform setup, full CLI reference
course_management_notes: 4 tickets, 4 in_the_hole — zero misses, zero hazards (4th consecutive clean sprint)
Tests grew from 675 to 704 (+29 across core and cli)
3 new files: report.ts, commands/report.ts, report tests
Phase 2 complete: S11 (telemetry) + S12 (guidance) + S13 (reports + launch) all delivered
